rationale: Fix path resolution bug: the official scripts/eval_ood.py uses ROOT_DIR = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)), '..') to navigate to the parent directory before joining with 'data'. The original code used os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)) directly, which resolved to /workspace/ instead of /workspace/../ (i.e., /), causing the data directory to be looked up at /workspace/data/ instead of /data/.
